neighborhoods.name: Castello / Marina (Cagliari)
neighborhoods.description: Historic hilltop and waterfront quarters of the capital with Pisan towers, cathedral, and harbour restaurants
neighborhoods.character: Historic hilltop-harbor, Pisan heritage, university city

housing.predominantType: Apartments in historic buildings and renovated palazzi

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Cagliari. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Poetto / Quartu
neighborhoods.description: Long beach area and adjacent town east of Cagliari with flamingo lagoon and beach lifestyle
neighborhoods.character: Beach residential, flamingo lagoon, summer lively

housing.predominantType: Apartments and houses near the beach

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Cagliari's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Iglesias
neighborhoods.description: Former mining town in southwestern Sardinia with medieval center and very affordable property
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Alghero
neighborhoods.description: Catalan-influenced coastal city on the northwest coast with coral fishing heritage and international residents
neighborhoods.character: Catalan heritage, coral coast, international tourists

housing.predominantType: Apartments in old town and coastal properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
